opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: The skin on my penis is completely swollen shut and it burns like fire, and there's a horrible thick white discharge coming from underneath. I can't pull the foreskin back at all anymore. On top of that I've been unbelievably thirsty and wiped out for months.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's flared up over and over for months but tonight it's gotten unbearable and I can't cope with the pain.

symptom_narrative.onset: Recurrent flare-ups of redness and swelling of the head of the penis and foreskin over the past six months, with a bad flare that escalated sharply tonight
symptom_narrative.duration: Six months of on-and-off episodes, acutely worse for the last several hours
symptom_narrative.character: Intense itching and a severe burning sensation, with a thick white curdy discharge building up under the foreskin and a sweet, foul smell
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: The pain and swelling tonight are the worst they have ever been
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: The head of the penis and the foreskin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: Keeps coming back every few weeks and never fully settles; much worse tonight
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: Any friction or rubbing against clothing; it hurts to walk normally
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: Extreme thirst and drinking constantly, passing large amounts of urine day and night, and profound tiredness over the same few months; pain with sex before it swelled up completely
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: Several similar but milder episodes of redness, itch and discharge over the past six months
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: Walking with a wide stance to avoid rubbing the sore area

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: Recurrent episodes of the same penile redness, swelling and discharge over the past six months
past_medical_history.how_managed: Never assessed by a doctor; has not seen a doctor in several years

social_history_volunteered.diet_and_exercise: Drinks large amounts of sugary soft drink every day; overweight and not physically active
social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: Has not accessed medical care in years; attends this consultation alone and is very distressed by the sensitive nature of the problem

objective_data_offered.value: Shows on camera a markedly swollen, red foreskin and head of the penis with thick white curdy material visible at the tip; the foreskin will not slide back
Says he is around 105 kg and has been steadily putting on weight
Says there are lots of empty large soft-drink bottles around the house from how much he has been drinking
